q: The individual parts of a medium do not move as a whole in heat ____?
An isobaric process occurs at constant ____?
In heat ____, heat is transferred by successive distribution among the adjacent parts.
The isochoric process occurs at constant ___?
In heat ____, heat is the flow of heat through a fluid by the movement of the fluid itself.
The isothermal process occurs at a constant ____?
Some of the weather conditions are created by heat ____?
For an ____ process, the change in internal energy is zero.
Heat ____ is a transfer of heat that does not require a material medium.
In the ____ process, there is no heat transfer into or out of the system.
The transfer of energy by ____ does not require an intervening medium.
In the ____ process, the heat flow is zero.
An object which can absorb all the electromagnetic radiation falling upon it is a ____?
The heat, the work, and the change in internal energy are nonzero in ___?
In the intake stroke of the gasoline engine, the piston ____?
In the compression stroke of the gasoline engine, the piston ___?
In the explosion process of the gasoline engine, the piston ____?
In the power stroke of the gasoline engine, the piston ____?
In the valve exhaust process of the gasoline engine, the piston ___?
In the exhaust stroke of the gasoline engine, the piston ____?
